summary: Logs show agent startup, DNS resolution attempts (including repeated 'unable to resolve domain' messages) and cleanup of orphan processes, but no explicit test failure or error output for the unit tests appears in the provided logs.

evidence.reason: Shows the job reached an initialized state but the log excerpt does not include any explicit test failure lines (no 'FAIL' or test error details).
Indicates the run ended and cleanup occurred, but does not show the cause of failure or failing test output in the excerpt.

evidence.quote: unable to resolve domain: cluster-api.example.com. err: unable to resolve domain cluster-api.example.com., status 0
evidence.reason: Demonstrates DNS resolution failures in the logs which could point to a network-related problem, but this alone does not conclusively identify the CI failure reason in the provided context.

evidence.quote: [Source code overwritten] file: /home/runner/work/argo-cd/argo-cd/.git/objects/maintenance.lock syscall: openat by exe: /usr/lib/git-core/git

suggested_fix: Re-run the CI job to capture the full test output and any failing test messages. If failures persist, check network/DNS connectivity for hosts referenced in the logs (e.g., cluster-api.example.com) and ensure dependencies can be fetched (proxy.golang.org). If the run is flaky, retry the job or increase logging verbosity to capture the failing command and error details.
